fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the production order to which the component list belongs.

fields.name: Prod. Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related production order.

fields.name: Prod. Order Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the production order line to which the component list belongs.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item that is a component in the production order component list.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the item on the line.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the quantity of the component that is needed to produce one unit of the item that is specified on the production order.
The program automatically calculates this field on the basis of the Quantity per field and - if the Calculation Formula is filled in - the value(s) in the Length, Width, Weight, and/or Depth fields.

fields.name: Position
fields.tooltip: Specifies the position of the component on the bill of material.

fields.name: Position 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies the components position in the BOM. It is copied from the production BOM when you calculate the production order.

fields.name: Position 3
fields.tooltip: Specifies the third reference number for the component position on a bill of material, such as the alternate position number of a component on a print card.

fields.name: Lead-Time Offset
fields.tooltip: Specifies the lead-time offset for the component line. It is copied from the corresponding field in the production BOM when you calculate the production order.

fields.name: Routing Link Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the routing link code when you calculate the production order.

fields.name: Scrap %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage of the item that you expect to be scrapped in the production process.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Expected Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the component expected to be consumed during the production of the quantity on this line.

fields.name: Remaining Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the difference between the finished and planned quantities, or zero if the finished quantity is greater than the remaining quantity.

fields.name: Act. Consumption (Qty)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the component that has already been consumed during the production of the quantity on the production order line that the component list belongs to. The program automatically calculates the quantity when you post a consumption journal.

fields.name: Flushing Method
fields.tooltip: Specifies how consumption of the item (component) is calculated and handled in production processes. Manual: Enter and post consumption in the consumption journal manually. Forward: Automatically posts consumption according to the production order component lines when the first operation starts. Backward: Automatically calculates and posts consumption according to the production order component lines when the production order is finished. Pick + Forward / Pick + Backward: Variations with warehousing.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional description text.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location where the component is stored. It is copied from the corresponding field on the production order line.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bin in which the component is to be placed before it is consumed.

fields.name: Supplied-by Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the production order line number that supplies the component line on the planning line.

This field is used internally.

fields.name: Planning Level Code
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally. The field indicates which planning level the item on the production order line belongs to. The program automatically fills in this field when it calculates a plan or refreshes a multilevel production order.

fields.name: Item Low-Level Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the component items level in the production BOM. This code is copied from the Low-Level Code field on the item card.

fields.name: Length
fields.tooltip: Specifies the length of one item unit when measured in the specified unit of measure.

fields.name: Width
fields.tooltip: Specifies the width of one item unit when measured in the specified unit of measure.

fields.name: Weight
fields.tooltip: Specifies the weight of one item unit when measured in the specified unit of measure.

fields.name: Depth
fields.tooltip: Specifies the depth of one item unit when measured in the specified unit of measure.

fields.name: Calculation Formula
fields.tooltip: Specifies how to calculate the Quantity field.

fields.name: Quantity per
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the component are required to produce the parent item.

fields.name: Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of one unit of the item or resource on the line.

fields.name: Cost Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total cost on the line by multiplying the unit cost by the quantity.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the production order component must be available for consumption. The date is copied from the Starting Date field on the related production order line.

fields.name: Due Time
fields.tooltip: Copies the time from the Starting Time field on the production order line to which the component belongs. This is the time that the component is needed.

fields.name: Qty. per Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity if the quantity per item unit of measure is specified for the unit of measure code on the component's item card. Otherwise, the value in this field is automatically set to 1.

fields.name: Remaining Qty. (Base)
fields.tooltip: Calculates the quantity in this field as the quantity in the Remaining Quantity field multiplied by the quantity in the Qty. per Unit of Measure field.

fields.name: Quantity (Base)
fields.tooltip: This field is automatically updated. The field shows the Quantity field on the line expressed in base units of measure.

fields.name: Reserved Qty. (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reserved quantity of the item in base units of measure.

fields.name: Reserved Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of this item have been reserved.

fields.name: Expected Qty. (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Expected Quantity field on the line expressed in base units of measure. This field is automatically updated.

fields.name: Due Date-Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the due date and the due time, which are combined in a format called "due date-time".

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.


Additional Information


The dimension set ID is not edited directly by users. The value of the field is calculated with the dimension values that users select in the Edit Dimension Set Entries window.


The value 0 represents an empty dimension set.

fields.name: Substitution Available
fields.tooltip: Specifies if an item substitute is available for the production order component.

fields.name: Original Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item that was originally on the component list before it was substituted.

fields.name: Original Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the variant that was originally on the component list before the item was substituted.

fields.name: Pick Qty.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of outstanding units in the warehouse.

fields.name: Qty. Picked
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the item you have picked for the component line.

fields.name: Qty. Picked (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the item you have picked for the component line.

fields.name: Completely Picked
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the production order component lines have been completely picked.

fields.name: Pick Qty. (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the item are being picked for the component line in the base unit of measure. The program calculates the quantity from the Pick Qty. fields on warehouse pick lines for the component line.

fields.name: Direct Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the direct unit costs for the production order component.

fields.name: Indirect Cost %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the indirect cost as a percent for the production order component.

fields.name: Overhead Rate
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the overhead rate of the production order component.
You can set up an overhead rate to cover expenses other than material or capacity costs, for example, transport expenses for the production order component.
The Overhead Rate is an absolute amount. Even if the item consists of more than one item, the amount does not depend on the number of items.
The Overhead Rate is added to the total amount of the component. The Amount does not depend on the number of components.

fields.name: Direct Cost Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of the direct cost of the production order component.

fields.name: Overhead Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of the overhead of the production order component.
